props.title: Build products your users will love

props.heading: Everything you need, nothing you don't

items.title: Instant deploys
items.description: Push to main and your changes are live in seconds. Zero config, zero downtime.

items.title: Built-in security
items.description: SOC 2 Type II certified with end-to-end encryption. Your data stays yours.

items.title: Real-time analytics

props.heading: Ready to ship faster?
props.body: Join over 10,000 teams already building with Nova. Free plan available — no credit card required.
